question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024 by brand. Based on the percentage labels, which statement is correct?

options.A: Apple has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.B: Huawei has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.C: Samsung has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.D: Xiaomi and Others together account for more than half of the market.

explanation: From the labels, Huawei has the highest share (38%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Samsung is largest when relying on visual comparison.
